Title: La fabrication du chocolat
Description:
De la cabosse à la tablette de chocolat, découvrez les transformations subies par les fèves de cacao.
La chocolaterie Alex Olivier propose des visites guidée dégustation toute l'année.

Title: La baleine bleue
Description: La baleine bleue, appelée aussi rorqual bleu, est une espèce de cétacés de la famille des balænopteridés. Sa longueur moyenne est de 25 à 27 m pour une masse de 130 tonnes, les femelles étant plus grandes que les mâles.

Title: Do Chairs Exist???
Description: Vsauce explores the surprisingly complex philosophy of existence, questioning what truly constitutes reality. The video uses everyday objects like chairs and origami to delve into ontology, composition, and the nature of properties. Prepare for a mind-bending journey through philosophical concepts.

Title: Illusions of Time
Description: Vsauce explores how our minds distort our perception of time. The video examines "prospective" and "retrospective" timing, revealing how different experiences impact our memory of duration. Prepare to question your understanding of the past, present, and future.

Title: There Is Something Faster Than Light
Description: How an argument between Einstein and Bohr changed quantum mechanics forever.

Title: The Closest Weve Come to a Theory of Everything
Description: The single principle that underpins all of physics. Head to https://brilliant.org/veritasium to start your free 30-day trial and get 20% off an annual premium subscription.
